$note: Trackable manual patches to the Tier 1 locales catalog. Applied at Tier 2 build time AFTER loading Tier 1 src-data and BEFORE cross-catalog M:M backfill. Each entry carries a `reason` + `addedAt` so the policy decision is audit-trail visible without git-archaeology. Use `pnpm geo:overlays` to list active patches with their reasons. See ./README.md for the pattern + when to add an overlay vs fix upstream.

additions.reason: CLDR availableLocales does not ship fr-TF; French Southern Territories has French as administrative primary locale; added via overlay to support country.primaryLocaleIETFBCP47Tag = 'fr-TF' resolution. Mirrors fr-WF / fr-PM (other French minor-territory locale entries CLDR DOES ship). Field values derived from fr-WF (closest peer): same separators + DMY date pattern that French-region locales canonically share.
